title: Munter hitch (UIAA / Italian hitch)
description: A belay/rappel friction knot tied through a carabiner — stands in for a belay device. Works in both directions and releases easily with a flick of the wrist.
steps: Fold the rope into a loop.
Clip the loop onto a carabiner so both sides of the rope lie next to each other.
Flip the loop over the carabiner spine — the hitch is ready; flip it again to reverse braking direction.
